name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Aeha
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a AEHA code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The address to send the command to, see dumper output for more details.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The command to send; a length of 2-35 bytes can be specified for one packet.

config_entries.label: Carrier Frequency
config_entries.description: Set a frequency to send the signal with for infrared signals. Defaults to `38000Hz`.
